happy.description: Uplifting, positive, feel-good energy. Songs that make you smile or want to move.

chill.description: Relaxed and easygoing. No rush, no tension. Perfect for unwinding without falling asleep.

intense.description: Powerful, driving, high-stakes energy. Music that pushes you to go harder.

relaxed.description: Calm and comfortable. More settled than chill — you're not just unwinding, you're fully at rest.
relaxed.avoid: High tempo, energetic, or aggressive tracks

focused.description: Steady and non-distracting. Helps maintain concentration without boredom or interruption.

moody.description: Atmospheric and emotionally complex. Could be melancholy, nostalgic, or introspective. Not sad, but not cheerful either.

playful.description: Fun, lighthearted, and a bit cheeky. Doesn't take itself too seriously.

warm.description: Comforting and cozy. Like a fireplace or a cup of tea — inviting and soft.

dreamy.description: Hazy, floating, and somewhat otherworldly. Feels like being half-asleep or lost in thought.
dreamy.avoid: Sharp, rhythmically rigid, or aggressive tracks

confident.description: Bold, assured, and self-possessed. Music that makes you feel capable and in control.

tense.description: Edgy, anxious, or suspenseful. Creates a sense of forward momentum or unease — great for focus with urgency.
